overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a rural frontier settlement at night. The character approaches a wooden house, takes shelter on the porch during a rain shower, then continues exploring the muddy settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open settlement yard approaching wooden frontier house

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a wooden frontier house with warm lantern light glowing in the windows

entered.detail: single-story wooden house with glowing windows and a covered front porch
rough wooden fence posts marking the property boundary
tall wooden post with a hanging lantern illuminating the path
overhanging wooden roof structure of the house porch

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open dirt yard toward a wooden frontier house at night. The house windows glow with warm light against the cool blue darkness, and a wooden lamp post stands to the right of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden porch of frontier house during rainfall

events.description: rain begins to fall, visible as silver streaks in the lantern light beyond the porch
character stops walking and turns to look out at the rain falling over the settlement

agents.ego_description: standing under the porch roof, looking out at the rain and the dark settlement beyond

entered.detail: wooden beam ceiling of the porch providing shelter from the rain
thick wooden posts supporting the porch roof structure
oil lantern sitting on a wooden table casting warm yellow light
square wooden crate sitting on the porch floor

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the wooden porch, gaining shelter from the weather. Rain begins to fall, visible in the lantern light beyond the porch edge. The character pauses to look out at the rainy night scene from under the protective roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy settlement paths between wooden shacks and storage structures

events.description: exits the covered porch back into the open rain, ground now visibly wet
turns left to walk around a large tree toward another building with lit windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy settlement, passing wooden shacks and fences, heading toward a distant lit building

entered.detail: small wooden storage shed with weathered planks
red wooden rowboat turned upside down on the dirt ground
large tree with hanging branches silhouetted against the night sky
warm orange glow of a fire illuminating a distant structure

segments.scene_description: Leaving the shelter of the porch, the character walks through the rain-soaked settlement. The ground is visibly wet and muddy. The character passes a red rowboat and wooden shacks, navigating around a large tree toward another building with warm light glowing in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet frontier settlement at night that transforms from a dry walk into a rain-soaked exploration. It begins with the character crossing an open dirt yard toward a wooden house, where warm window light contrasts with the cool blue darkness of the night. As the character steps onto the wooden porch, the scene shifts to a moment of shelter while rain begins to fall, visible through the glow of a nearby lantern. The camera then follows the character as they leave the roof's protection and venture back into the storm, where the ground has turned wet and muddy. Finally, the path leads past a red rowboat and wooden shacks, navigating around a large tree toward another distant building glowing with warm light.
